response.overview: Ethan, a damaged teenager full of dark imagination, lives in the shadow of the bad boys at school, always trying to prove his worth, but without the courage to do anything really wrong. To vent, he keeps a secret notebook where he draws and writes, in a macabre way, how he will get rid of the people who are around him and do not necessarily value him in a way he wants. One day, he loses his notebook, but recovers it the next day. Relieved, he thinks everything is fine - until the people he "killed" in his fantasies begin to appear dead exactly as he imagined. While the police investigate, Ethan panics more and more, not knowing what he does. Who is behind the murders? A stranger who found the notebook? Your friends? Or Ethan's own imagination, which may have gone too far?
response.title: The Things I Didn't Do
